disposition.reason: agent-ui is currently an upstream Agno Agent UI template/local chat UI shell, not a ZestStream-owned tenant-bound runtime deploy. No repo-local .infisical.json, Supabase project ref, tenant database, or ZestStream deployment identifier was found in the scoped probe. If Joshua adopts it as a ZestStream-hosted product surface later, L168 should be rerun and a tenant row/declaration added then.

flywheel_gateway is currently a standalone gateway substrate with local SQLite as the documented quick-start database and BYOA provider-key configuration. It is not presently a ZestStream tenant-bound deploy backed by Infisical plus Supabase. If a hosted ZestStream gateway deployment is created, L168 should be rerun and a tenant row/declaration added for that deployment.
